Download VOGO Plugin for WordPress

Download the official vogo-plugin.zip package and follow the setup flow below for full installation and plugin configuration in WordPress.

Download vogo-plugin.zip View installation steps Contact support on WhatsApp

What this page includes

You have the complete plugin activation flow in one place:

  • direct download link for the ZIP package;
  • clear WordPress installation instructions;
  • full VOGO Admin plugin configuration steps with screenshots.

WordPress plugin installation steps

  1. 01

    Log in to your WordPress admin panel (/wp-admin) with an administrator account.

  2. 02

    Open Plugins → Add New Plugin.

  3. 03

    Click the Upload Plugin button.

  4. 04

    Select the vogo-plugin.zip file downloaded from this page.

  5. 05

    Click Install Now and wait for the installation to finish.

  6. 06

    Click Activate Plugin to enable it.

Note: If WordPress shows permission errors during installation, check write access for /wp-content/plugins.

VOGO Admin plugin configuration steps

  1. 01

    Access VOGO brand control page. Open the plugin control area from WordPress admin and confirm you can see the full brand setup dashboard.

  2. 02

    Start self-install and auto-diagnostics. Run the automated checks to validate required plugin dependencies and system readiness before continuing.

  3. 03

    Review logs displayed automatically. Confirm the status logs and continue only after all critical checks report successful results.

  4. 04

    Configure general settings. Complete the core plugin fields with validated project values to ensure stable plugin behavior.

  5. 05

    Configure colors and texts for the mobile application. Set the approved visual and content options used by the mobile app screens.

  6. 06

    Configure brand colors, text, logo, and images for the mobile application. Upload and verify all brand assets so the mobile app matches the official VOGO identity.

  7. 07

    Configure company data. Complete company profile fields exactly as required for platform display and operational records.

  8. 08

    Save settings. Click save and confirm success before leaving the page to ensure all updates are stored correctly.

Recommendation: After each plugin update, re-open this page, review key settings, and run a quick functional check.
